name: AMD
rationale: Small starter long only. AMD clears the multi-horizon momentum screen better than the rest of the watchlist: 1W +4.38%, 1M +0.13% and 3M +94.15%, with 4.84% daily vol, so position size stays modest. The catalyst is real and dated: AMD’s Advancing AI 2026 keynote is today, and Reuters says AMD is set to launch a raft of AI hardware to rival Nvidia. AMD’s IR calendar also shows fiscal Q2 2026 earnin
